reviewer.description: Read-only code reviewer. Use after implementation for a fresh-context review of the diff, touched files, and verification output. Reports findings clearly and does not edit unless asked.

review.description: Run a fresh-context code review using the shared repo review contract
review.template:
Review the current changes using prompts/code-review.md and AGENTS.md.

Use this evidence:
- Diff stat: !`git diff --stat`
- Full diff: !`git diff`
- Verification output: include any relevant make, lint, test, build, or generator output that is available.

If a handoff was provided, use it as context. Report findings in the required format and end with exactly one verdict line.
